name: 5' x 7' Warm Austin Woven Outdoor Rug Pink - Threshold™
description:
For a decor update that pulls your whole space together, choose the Warm Austin Woven Outdoor Rug from Threshold™. Made from durable fabric that stands up to the elements, this eye-catching outdoor rug features a large Southwest-inspired geometric pattern in pink, orange, black and tan, and the ends are finished with knotted multicolored tassels for a touch of added texture and style. The seven- by five-foot size makes this rug ideal for patios, screened porches and other outdoor entertainment spaces. Plus, it's ultra easy to clean — simply spray off dirt and debris with a garden hose or wipe clean with a damp cloth to keep it looking great all season long.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
